description: Rename OpenCode-dependent tabs to Anvil branding ('Anvil Chat', 'Anvil Workspace') and add Termux/Shizuku integration for running the Bellows server locally on an Android phone. This includes: (1) Tab renaming in the layout, (2) A new lib/termux/ module with helpers to detect Termux, launch it with commands, and manage the local Bellows server lifecycle, (3) A new TermuxSection settings component that shows server status and provides launch/stop buttons, (4) Integration in the Settings screen.
steps: 1. In app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx: Rename the 'index' tab from tabBarLabel 'Chat' to 'Forge' (the Anvil forging metaphor). Keep title as 'ANVIL'. Rename the 'workspace' tab title from 'Workspace' to 'Anvil Workspace'. Use a hammer/anvil icon metaphor: change the Chat icon from 'message.fill' to 'hammer.fill' and keep workspace as 'folder.fill'.

2. Create lib/termux/termux.ts with: (a) isTermuxInstalled() - uses expo-intent-launcher to check if com.termux is resolvable, (b) launchTermux(command?: string) - launches Termux with an optional RUN_COMMAND intent extra, (c) launchBellowsServer() - calls launchTermux with the command to start litellm proxy (pip install litellm && litellm --config /data/data/com.termux/files/home/bellows-config.yaml --port 4000), (d) stopBellowsServer() - sends a kill command via Termux intent, (e) Types and constants (TERMUX_PACKAGE, TERMUX_RUN_COMMAND_ACTION, default port).

3. Create components/settings/termux-section.tsx: A Card-based settings section showing: Termux install status (detected/not detected), a 'Start Bellows Server' button that calls launchBellowsServer(), a 'Stop Server' button, a link to install Termux from F-Droid if not installed, current server status (checking localhost:4000 connectivity). Follow the same Card/List.Item pattern used in bellows-section.tsx.
4. In app/(tabs)/settings.tsx: Import and render the new TermuxSection between BellowsSection and AiDefaultsSection. Pass palette and relevant state.
5. Create lib/termux/index.ts as the barrel export for the termux module.
acceptance_criteria: Tab bar shows 'Forge' label for the chat tab and 'Anvil Workspace' for workspace tab
lib/termux/termux.ts exports isTermuxInstalled, launchTermux, launchBellowsServer, stopBellowsServer functions
components/settings/termux-section.tsx renders a settings card with start/stop buttons and Termux status
Settings screen includes the TermuxSection component
npm run typecheck passes with no errors
npm run lint passes with no errors
findings: ActivityAction enum in expo-intent-launcher does not include MAIN - used raw string 'android.intent.action.MAIN' instead. MaterialIcons 'hardware' icon used as the Android/web fallback for SF Symbol 'hammer.fill'.
